alcohol-habits.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and identify the patient's alcohol habit status.

Allowed values:
1. Alcohol habits: History of alcohol dependence.
2. Alcohol habits: Current.
3. Alcohol habits: Never.
If not mentioned, output: "Alcohol habits: Unknown."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

before-treatment-patient-diagnosed.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract comorbidities diagnosed BEFORE oncologic treatment.

Allowed values:
- atrial fibrillation
- cholecystectomy
- dementia
- diabetes (without complications)
- peripheral vascular disease
- mild liver disease
- moderate to severe liver disease
- myocardial infarction
- moderate to severe renal disease
- chronic pulmonary disease
- solid tumor (non metastatic)

If multiple, list separated by comma and space, ordered alphabetically.
If none, output: "Before treatment Patient was diagnosed of following comorbidities: none."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

chemotherapy_start.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract chemotherapy start details.

Output format:
[setting] chemotherapy with [select intent] intent started on [provide date] [location].

Allowed settings: Concomitant Chemotherapy, Neo-adjuvant Chemotherapy, Systemic treatment alone Chemotherapy, Chemotherapy.
Allowed intents: curative, palliative.
Allowed locations: at the hospital, outside of the hospital.
If setting is missing, keep [Select setting of systemic treatment]. If date is missing, keep [provide date]. If intent is missing, keep [select intent].
If chemotherapy start is not mentioned, output: "Unknown chemotherapy start."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

clinical-tnmstaging.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract clinical TNM staging.

Output format: cTT[T_value]NN[N_value]MM[M_value]
Always prefix with "cTT", "NN", and "MM".
If M component is missing, output '[select m]' for M value.
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown clinical TNM staging."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

Histology subgroup Squamous: Squamous cell carcinoma keratinizing.
Histology subgroup Squamous: Squamous cell carcinoma spindle cell.
Histology subgroup Squamous: Squamous cell carcinoma.
Histology subgroup Teratocarcinosarcoma.

Output format: pTT[T_value]NN[N_value]MM[M_value]
Extract only pathological staging (pT, pN). Ignore clinical staging (cT, cN, cM).

patient-status.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract the patient status at last follow-up.

Allowed values:
1. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive, No Evidence of Disease (NED).
2. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Dead of Disease (DOD).
3. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - metastases ([sites]).
4. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Alive With Disease (AWD) - localised tumor.
5. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Dead of Other Cause (DOC).
6. Status of the patient at last follow-up: Dead of Unknown Cause (DUC).
For metastases, list all mentioned sites in parentheses.
If not mentioned, output: "Unknown patient status."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

staging-classification.template:
You are a medical annotator. Read the note and extract the explicitly written cancer stage.

Rules:
- Extract only stages explicitly written as "stadio X", "Stadio X", or "stage X".
- Do NOT infer stage from TNM.
- Preserve sub-stages exactly (IVA, IVB, IVC).
- Allowed Roman numerals: I, III, IV, IVA, IVB, IVC.

Output format:
Staging classification (pathological): <stage>. (if near pT/pN or after surgery)
Staging classification (clinical): <stage>. (if near cT/cN or explicitly clinical)
Staging classification: <stage>. (if no clinical/pathological context)
If not mentioned, output: "Staging classification (clinical): [please select]."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}

surgery-reconstruction.template:

Output format: <surgery type> <with/without> reconstruction was performed on <DATE> <LOCATION> with a <INTENTION> intention.

Allowed surgery types: Craniofacial, External/open, Transnasal, Transoral.
Allowed intentions: curative, palliative.
Allowed locations: at the hospital, outside of the hospital.
If surgery type is missing, keep [select surgery type]. If date is missing, keep [provide date]. If location is missing, keep [select where]. If intention is missing, keep [select intention]. If reconstruction is unclear, keep [with/without] reconstruction.
If no surgery is mentioned, output: "No surgery information."

Respond with JSON only: {"final_output": "<annotation>"}
